description: Broader Mistral instruct parity pack for exact Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3 Q8_0. Five practical prompts run for 50 tokens each against llama.cpp to widen evidence beyond the bounded 5-token context ladder. This pack intentionally includes tokenizer-stress vocabulary; failures should be diagnosed, not hidden.

prompts.note: Short assistant prose with simple local-model wording.

messages.content: You are a concise local assistant. Answer clearly in two short sentences.
write a short note that says a local model can help draft code and explain tests.

prompts.note: Small numbered instruction list about rust validation.

messages.content: give three short steps for checking a rust change before a public push.

prompts.note: Structured prose that often exercises punctuation without requiring strict JSON validity.

messages.content: You summarize status in a compact structured style.
summarize this status with labels: model loaded, chat ready, evidence pending.

prompts.note: Tokenizer stress prompt includes words that previously exposed Mistral piece-boundary drift while keeping generation deterministic enough for 50-token parity.

messages.content: Reply with exactly this sentence: Fact alpaca MSTR mstr CMLD checksum gamma llama.

prompts.note: Natural chat diagnostic wording with deterministic phrasing to distinguish prompt/runtime parity from open-ended sampling drift.

messages.content: You answer with the requested sentence exactly.
Reply with exactly this sentence: Check prompt tokens first, then logits, then cache state.
